tui.family: Shannon + Harvey (golden) · married Jul '25 · first house Oct '25 · cottage country is the best time of year.
tui.craft: "Simplicity beats cleverness. If it needs a manual, it probably needs a redesign."
tui.play: Hockey · Golf · Squash · Guitar · LOTR · GOT · Mr. Robot (IYKYK) · Plex homelab

pillars.name: Family
pillars.story: My wife Shannon and I have been married since July 2025, we bought our first house in Oct 2025 and we have a spoiled golden retriever named Harvey that is our pride and joy. The best time of year is up in cottage country where Harvey can sprint down the dock and launch into the water, quickly followed by a boat ride to air-dry!
pillars.shapeWork: I take pride in my family, and I always want what's best for those around me. I'm always on the lookout for how I can make things better or more enjoyable.

pillars.name: Craft
pillars.story: I build software the way I want software to feel as a user: simple, fast, and frictionless, but still nice to look at. Every flow, button, color, API, and deployment decision starts from the same place — as a user, what would I expect right here? That question isn't a step in the process. It's the foundation everything else is built on.
pillars.shapeWork: Simplicity beats cleverness. If it needs a manual, it probably needs a redesign.

pillars.name: Play
pillars.story: Some of my biggest passions in life involve sports like Hockey, Golf, Squash - if it's competitve, I love it. I also enjoy playing guitar, reading (when I'm in the mood), and diving in to a great movie series or show (LOTR, GOT, Mr. Robot - IYKYK). On the weekends you'll find me working on a project around the house, tweeking settings on my home media server, or enjoying time with my family.
pillars.shapeWork: Everything I do for fun, whether it be sports, personal projects, or working on the boat at the cottage, all ties in to how I conduct my work. If I'm going to do anything, I'm going to do it right.
